overview: A full-featured food delivery app where customers can browse restaurants, explore menus, add items to cart, place orders, and track delivery status in real time.
features: Restaurant browsing with search and filters
Menu organized by food categories with item details
Shopping cart with instant total updates
Order status tracking (confirmed, preparing, on the way, delivered)
Internet Identity login for secure accounts
User logo branding throughout the app
Sample restaurant and menu data included
